epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Abnormal cytology or HPV testing with colposcopy and biopsy confirmation

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; depends on screening and follow-up

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Pap smear and colposcopy in referral services
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Excisional procedures for precancer; surgery and chemoradiation for invasive disease
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Uneven screening and HPV vaccine uptake
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: SUS screening programs and HPV vaccination
